steps.title: Calculate the value of z
steps.content:
Given that the value of $z$ is 1.12 times 100:

$$z = 1.12 \times 100 = 112$$

steps.title: Determine what percent greater z is than 100
steps.content:
To find what percent greater $z$ is than 100, calculate the difference and express it as a percent of the original value. The difference is $112 - 100 = 12$:

$$\frac{12}{100} \times 100 = 12\%$$

That matches choice B — B is correct.
